message:
fix(fr-store): FUNCTION DUMP body preserves description field across restore (br-frankenredis-r85v)

Self-review of the new RDB-encoded body found a real defect:
FunctionLibrary.description (Option<String>) was silently dropped
on dump → restore. FUNCTION LIST surfaces this field, so a
roundtrip-restored library would lose its documented description.

Add a 1-byte presence flag (0=None, 1=Some) followed by an
rdb-string when present, immediately after the engine field per
library. Decoder mirrors the encoding and rejects unknown flag
bytes with the existing 'Invalid dump data' wording.

New test function_dump_restore_roundtrip_preserves_description_field
pins the round-trip behaviour.

fr-store 290 passed; fr-command 656 passed; cargo clippy --tests
-D warnings clean; cargo fmt --check clean.

Slice of br-frankenredis-r85v.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
